description_long: This is a circular ornamental fountain with a wide, shallow basin bordered by a thick, uneven rim that appears to be made of stone or concrete. At the center, a large, urn-like vessel sits elevated on a small plinth, surrounded by a ring of smooth pebbles. Four sculpted animal heads, possibly lions or similar creatures, are evenly spaced around the central vessel, each facing outward and likely serving as water spouts. The basin floor is decorated with a pattern resembling lily pads and flowers, rendered in soft greens and blues, giving the impression of a tranquil pond. The rim has several cut-out sections, adding a rustic, weathered character to the structure. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for placement in a public park or plaza.
description: A circular stone fountain with a central urn, four animal-head spouts, and a lily pad motif in the basin. The rim is thick and irregular, with cut-out sections and a naturalistic finish.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the central urn, three visible animal-head spouts, and the detailed lily pad pattern in the basin.
description_view_1: This angle shows the urn and all four animal-head spouts, as well as the cut-out sections in the rim on the right side.
description_view_2: The urn is prominent, with the animal-head spouts more evenly distributed in view, and the cut-out rim sections are clearly visible on the left.
description_view_3: The urn is seen from behind, with the animal-head spouts and the thick, uneven rim most visible, as well as the pebbled area around the urn.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features four sculpted animal heads, likely lions, serving as decorative spouts. The basin is adorned with a painted or tiled lily pad and flower motif, and the rim has a rustic, chipped appearance for added character.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is wide, circular, and shallow with a thick, uneven rim and several cut-out sections. It has a single tier and a central raised area for the urn.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: Four jets, likely emerging from the mouths of the animal-head spouts, are arranged symmetrically around the central urn and oriented outward, creating a radial spray pattern.
